title: Tableau Leather Cream 200ml – Nourishes, Restores and Protects Leather Sofas, Car Seats, Bags, Jackets, Footwear and Upholstery for Long-Lasting Care
features: RESTORES AND NOURISHES LEATHER: Tableau Leather Cream deeply conditions and rejuvenates leather items, from jackets and boots to sofas and bags, keeping them soft, supple, and protected.
CLEAN AND PROTECT YOUR LEATHER: Works as a leather cleaner and conditioner for sofas, car seats, leather bags, and furniture, helping prevent cracking, fading, or wear.
VERSATILE APPLICATIONS: Ideal for leather sofas, leather jackets, boots, bags, and accessories; complements car interior cleaner, upholstery cleaner solution, and car leather cleaner routines.
EASY TO USE: Simply apply with a soft cloth to sofas, boots, and bags; gently rub in, let absorb, and buff to restore lustre and texture without residue.
LONG-LASTING PROTECTION: Nourishes and restores natural oils, helping maintain leather’s durability and finish over time; perfect with leather restorer, leather repair kits, or saddle soap.
